claim: Late December 2025 marks an agentic inflection point where frontier models can generate large, correct code sections autonomously, not just isolated snippets—fundamentally shifting developer experience from active coding to management
actionable: If using code agents now, shift workflow from validation of snippets to validation of multi-step logic chains and architectural coherence
source_title: From Vibe Coding to Agentic Engineering at AI Ascent 2026 — DE bilingual review

claim: Software paradigm 3.0 (LLM-driven execution) bypasses intermediate application layers entirely—a multimodal LLM can replace architecture (OCR + API + UI rendering) by handling end-to-end task completion directly
actionable: When designing new systems, evaluate whether an LLM can handle the entire flow end-to-end before building layered microservices; you may be over-architecting
source_title: From Vibe Coding to Agentic Engineering at AI Ascent 2026 — DE bilingual review

claim: LLMs become primary OS-level brain handling unstructured inputs (video, audio, text); traditional CPUs relegated to coprocessor role called only for deterministic tasks (calculation, code interpretation)
actionable: Architect systems where LLM is the main control flow and deterministic tools are invoked as external utilities, not the reverse
source_title: From Vibe Coding to Agentic Engineering at AI Ascent 2026 — DE bilingual review

claim: Frontier models have highly unequal capability distributions: peak performance in verifiable domains (math, coding) via RL, but blind spots in common-sense reasoning tasks outside training distribution
actionable: Test models on basic commonsense tasks outside your training domain before deploying; do not assume capabilities transfer across unverifiable task types
source_title: From Vibe Coding to Agentic Engineering at AI Ascent 2026 — DE bilingual review

claim: Vibe coding democratizes software creation (anyone can prompt models and ship) but agentic engineering is the professional discipline: requires deep architectural understanding, control of agent communication, and constraint specification
actionable: Transition from vibe coding to agentic engineering by adding scaffolding: explicit goals, agent routing rules, inter-agent communication protocols, and fallback error handling
source_title: From Vibe Coding to Agentic Engineering at AI Ascent 2026 — DE bilingual review
